statusUsingNoDesc: Okukozesa enkyusa nga temuli nnyonyola ya maloboozi
statusLoadingNoDesc: Okutikka enkyusa nga tewali nnyonyola ya maloboozi
alertDescribedVersion: Okukozesa enkyusa ya vidiyo eyogerwako mu maloboozi
alertNonDescribedVersion: Okukozesa enkyusa nga temuli audio description ya vidiyo
fallbackError2: Browser zino wammanga zikwatagana n’omuzannyi ono
prefTitleDescriptions: Ebintu by’oyagala ennyo mu kunnyonnyola amaloboozi
prefIntroCaptions: Ebintu bino wammanga bye baagala bye bifuga engeri ebigambo ebitonotono gye byanjulwamu.
prefIntroDescription1: Omuzannyi ono awagira okunnyonnyola amaloboozi mu ngeri bbiri:
prefIntroDescriptionNone: Vidiyo eriwo kati terina nnyonyola ya maloboozi mu nkola yonna.
prefIntroDescription3: Kozesa foomu eri wansi okuteekawo by’oyagala ku kunnyonnyola kw’amaloboozi mu biwandiiko.
prefIntroDescription4: Oluvannyuma lw’okutereka ensengeka, osobola okutandika oba okuggyako ennyonyola y’amaloboozi ng’okozesa bbaatuuni y’emu.
prefIntroKeyboard1: Omuzannyi ali ku lupapula luno asobola okuddukanyizibwa okuva wonna ng’okozesa enkola ennyangu eza keyboard (laba olukalala wansi).
prefIntroKeyboard2: Osobola okunnyonnyola ebisumuluzo by'omukyusa (Alt, Control ne/oba Shift).
prefIntroKeyboard3: NOTE: Ebisumuluzo ebimu ebigatta biyinza okukontana n’ebyo ebikozesebwa browser yo ne/oba enkola endala. Gezaako okugatta eby’enjawulo n’ebisumuluzo ebikyusa okutuusa lw’onoofuna ebikusaanira.
prefIntroTranscript: Ebintu bino wammanga bye baagala bikosa okuwandiika okukwatagana.
prefHeadingKeyboard1: Ebisumuluzo bya Modifier ebikozesebwa nga keyboard shortcuts
prefHeadingKeyboard2: Enkola ennyangu eza keyboard eziriwo kati
escapeKeyFunction: Ggalawo dialog oba popup eriwo kati
prefDescFormatHelp: Singa ensengeka zombi zibaawo, emu yokka ku zo y’ejja okukozesebwa.
prefDescFormatOption1: Vidiyo endala erimu ennyonyola y’amaloboozi eyingiziddwamu (eyakwatibwa nga tennabaawo).
prefDescFormatOption2: Ennyonnyola y’ebiwandiiko esomebwa omusomi w’oku ssirini (TTS) .
prefDescPause: Yimisa vidiyo mu ngeri ey’otoma ng’ennyonnyola etandise
prefDescVisible: Laga ennyonyola mu biwandiiko bwe kiba nga kisobozeseddwa
sampleDescriptionText: Teekateeka ensengeka zo okuwulira ekiwandiiko kino eky’ekyokulabirako.
prefHighlight: Laga ekiwandiiko ng’ebirimu bigenda mu maaso
windowMoveLeft: Eddirisa lyasenguka ne lidda ku kkono
windowMoveAlert: Senda oba kozesa ebisumuluzo by'obusaale okutambuza eddirisa; Nywa Enter okuyimirira.
windowSendBackAlert: Eddirisa lino teriri mabega wa kintu kyonna.
windowBringTopAlert: Eddirisa lino kati liri mu maaso g’ebintu ebirala ebiri ku lupapula.
resultsSummary4: Nywa ku budde obukwatagana n’ekintu kyonna okuzannya vidiyo okuva mu kifo ekyo.
copyrightSuffix: TOTHOMweb ku mukutu gwa yintaneeti. Eddembe lyonna liri mu buyinza bwaffe.
webEditionDescription: Ekitabo ekikoleddwa ku mutindo era ekigaziyiziddwa eky’omuzannyi w’emikutu ogutuukirirwa Able Player. Enkyukakyuka n’emirimu emirala egyakolebwa TOTHOMweb software ya bwannannyini.
wpEditionDescription: WordPress plugin eyongera widget ku Elementor, ekoleddwa okugatta ekitabo ekikoleddwa era ekigaziyiziddwa eky’omuzannyi w’emikutu ogutuukirirwa Able Player. Enkyukakyuka n’emirimu emirala egyakolebwa TOTHOMweb software ya bwannannyini.
thirdPartyDescription: Ekintu kino kirimu pulogulaamu zino wammanga ez’enkozesa enzigule:
